name: BEN_ELCN_RULES
description: BEN_ELCN_RULES identifies the enrollment dependency rules. A rule enforces the person to enroll into dependent opportunities. For example, person must enroll into Employee only option in HDHP plan in order to enroll into Employee only option in HSA plan.

columns.Name: BEN_ELCN_RULE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: PL_TYP_GRP_CD
columns.Comments: Indicates the plan type grouping code.

columns.Name: NAME
columns.Comments: Indicates the name of the rule.

columns.Name: DESCRIPTION
columns.Comments: Indicates the description of the rule.

columns.Name: PGM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_PGM_F. Used to identify the program.

columns.Name: PL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_PL_F.Used to identify the plan.

columns.Name: OIPL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_OIPL_F.Used to identify the option in plan.

columns.Name: OPT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_OPT_F.Used to identify the option.

columns.Name: RULE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Indicates the type of the election rule.

columns.Name: MUST_OIPL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_OIPL_F.Used to identify the option in plan.

columns.Name: MUST_PL_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_PL_F.Used to identify the plan.

columns.Name: MUST_OPT_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_OPT_F.Used to identify the option.

columns.Name: MUST_PGM_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign key to BEN_PGM_F.Used to identify the program.

columns.Name: SCOPE
columns.Comments: Module where rule needs to be validated.

columns.Name: MSG_TEXT
columns.Comments: Additional information of the rule.

columns.Name: STAT_CD
columns.Comments: Indicates the status of the rule.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: BUSINESS_GROUP_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HR_ORGANIZATION_UNITS
